description: Guy Esnouf has been Communications and Stakeholder Engagement Director for Radioactive Waste Management since mid-2020. In this role he is responsible for all external and internal engagement, focusing mainly the GDF programme. He started his career in politics, before moving to work in pharmaceuticals with Glaxo and Rhone Poulenc. He then spent 14 years in the United States, first in pharmaceuticals and then in IT with Unisys and Microsoft. On returning from the US, he worked for energy companies E.ON and npower, before joining RWM. Guy has been an active public speaker, presenting at and chairing numerous conferences, and has also appeared frequently on television and radio. He has a Ph.D. in History from Kings College London.

details.body:
Guy Esnouf has been Communications and Stakeholder Engagement Director for Radioactive Waste Management since mid-2020. In this role he is responsible for all external and internal engagement, focusing mainly the GDF programme.

He started his career in politics, before moving to work in pharmaceuticals with Glaxo and Rhone Poulenc. He then spent 14 years in the United States, first in pharmaceuticals and then in IT with Unisys and Microsoft. On returning from the US, he worked for energy companies E.ON and npower, before joining RWM.

Guy has been an active public speaker, presenting at and chairing numerous conferences, and has also appeared frequently on television and radio. He has a Ph.D. in History from Kings College London.

Guy has been an active public speaker, presenting at and chairing numerous conferences, and has also appeared frequently on television and radio. He has a Ph.D. in History from Kings College London.
